allow: PowerShell(foreach \($p in @\("/","/my-projects","/work","/about","/what-i-do","/contact","/resume"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \("http://localhost:3000" + $p\) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "$p = $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "$p = ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 30;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3100" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "READY home=$\($r.StatusCode\)"; $ok=$true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500 } }; if\(-not $ok\){"not ready yet"})
Bash(git commit -m 'Redesign portfolio with Büro-inspired UI and mobile optimization *)

PowerShell(try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3100" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; if \($r.Content -match "Mumbai &\(amp;\)? Pune"\) { "OK — 'Mumbai & Pune' is live on the page" } else { "served 200 but 'Pune' NOT found in HTML" } } catch { "DOWN $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
